name: Travel insurance baggage loss claim
description: User's baggage was lost on flight — needs claim guidance

input.message: I was travelling from Delhi to London and my checked-in baggage was lost by the airline. I have travel insurance. How do I claim for the lost baggage?

notes: Key steps: 1. File PIR at airport before leaving, 2. Get airline acknowledgment, 3. List items and values, 4. Contact insurer within 24-48 hrs, 5. Submit documents. Also: airline has liability (Montreal Convention $1,131 SDR for checked baggage). Claim from airline first, insurer covers the gap.
